wc2026.value: Sent off (straight red, 90+2') for denial of an obvious goal-scoring opportunity in Mexico's 2-0 win over South Africa — one of three reds in the opener; suspended for matchday two.

image.attribution: Selección Nacional de México / CC BY 3.0 via Wikimedia Commons
image.note: Mexico-kit shot — cut out to out/cutouts/cesar-montes.png for the consequences-scene corner sticker.
